title: Looking for Teacher at Aptech Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Aptech Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Aptech Advisory Limited in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aptech Advisory Limited:
Aptech Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
